description: The Coding Club promotes competitive programming, DSA practice, hackathons, and coding contests. Members participate in national and international coding competitions on platforms like CodeChef, LeetCode, and HackerRank.
joining_process: Attend orientation in first week of semester, fill online form at gnits.ac.in/clubs, clear basic coding test

description: GNITS IEEE Student Branch organizes technical workshops, paper presentations, and seminars on emerging technologies. Members get access to IEEE digital library and networking opportunities.
joining_process: Register on IEEE website, pay annual membership fee of Rs.500, attend branch induction program

description: Computer Society of India student chapter at GNITS conducts programming contests, technical quizzes, and industry interaction sessions to bridge the gap between academics and industry.
joining_process: Fill application form from CSI coordinator, attend interview, pay membership fee of Rs.300

description: The Robotics Club focuses on building autonomous robots, participating in national robotics competitions, and learning about embedded systems and IoT. Regular workshops on Arduino and Raspberry Pi.
joining_process: Submit application to faculty coordinator, demonstrate basic interest in electronics/programming, attend trial session

description: Members learn web development technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and backend frameworks. Club builds web solutions for college events and departments.
joining_process: Fill online form, complete beginner project assignment, attend club meeting

description: Focused on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, this club conducts study groups, project collaborations, and workshops on Python, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, and data science.
joining_process: Submit interest form, complete online Python quiz, attend orientation session

description: The Cybersecurity Club focuses on ethical hacking, CTF competitions, network security, and digital forensics. Members learn to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
joining_process: Register via college portal, attend security awareness session, complete beginner module

description: E-Cell promotes startup culture, innovation, and entrepreneurship among students. Organizes business plan competitions, startup talks, and mentorship programs.
joining_process: Express interest to faculty coordinator, attend E-Cell bootcamp, submit business idea pitch

description: The Cultural Club organizes all cultural activities including dance, music, drama, and traditional celebrations. Members participate in inter-college cultural fests.
joining_process: Audition during first month of semester, demonstrate talent in any art form, attend rehearsals

description: GNITS Drama Club stages plays, street plays, and mono-act performances for college events. Members are trained in acting, scriptwriting, and stage management.
joining_process: Attend audition announced on college notice board, perform short scene, selected by faculty panel

description: The Music Club includes both vocal and instrumental musicians. Regular practice sessions and performances during college events. Western and classical Indian music both covered.
joining_process: Attend auditions during first two weeks of semester, demonstrate singing or playing any instrument

description: GNITS Dance Club covers classical, folk, and western dance forms. Members perform at cultural fests, inter-college competitions, and college events.
joining_process: Attend dance audition announced on notice board, perform 1 minute routine, selected by coordinator

description: Photography Club trains members in DSLR photography, photo editing, videography, and documentation of college events. Has a photo studio and editing lab.
joining_process: Submit portfolio of 5 photos, attend orientation, borrow club camera for practice

description: The Literary Club organizes debates, elocutions, creative writing competitions, and book review sessions. Publishes annual college magazine.
joining_process: Fill interest form, participate in one debate session, attend club meeting in first week

description: National Service Scheme unit at GNITS organizes blood donation camps, tree plantation drives, village adoption programs, and social awareness campaigns.
joining_process: Fill NSS enrollment form from student affairs office, attend orientation camp, commit to 240 hours of service

description: National Cadet Corps at GNITS offers Army wing training including drill, map reading, and adventure activities. NCC certificate provides advantages in government job selection.
joining_process: Appear for physical fitness test, medical examination, fill NCC enrollment form

description: GNITS Sports Club manages all sports activities including cricket, volleyball, basketball, badminton, and athletics. Members represent college in university and national level competitions.
joining_process: Try out for specific sport during first month, selected based on skill level, attend training sessions

description: The Quiz Club organizes general knowledge, technical, and academic quizzes. Participates in inter-college quiz competitions and prepares students for competitive examinations.
joining_process: Attend introductory quiz session, demonstrate interest in general knowledge, fill membership form

description: GNITS Green Club focuses on environmental awareness, sustainability initiatives, campus beautification, and organizing events on environment day and earth day.
joining_process: Fill enrollment form, attend awareness session, commit to at least one initiative per semester

description: Indian Society for Technical Education student chapter conducts technical events, faculty development interactions, and educational workshops.
joining_process: Pay ISTE membership fee of Rs.200, fill enrollment form, attend chapter meeting

description: WEC organizes workshops on women safety, legal rights, health awareness, and career development specifically targeted at female students.
joining_process: Open to all female students, attend any WEC program, register with student affairs office

description: The Finance Club organizes stock market simulations, financial literacy workshops, and discussions on investment strategies. Prepares students for finance careers.
joining_process: Fill interest form, attend stock market simulation session, demonstrate basic financial interest
